inputs.title: Harden a cross-cutting Mission Control feature
inputs.description: Implement a repository-scoped feature with explicit acceptance criteria, checks, and review remediation.

rubric.criterion: The work is split into verifiable implementation and review contracts.
Review findings result in bounded author remediation.

provenance.notes: Privacy-reviewed summary of a completed local runtime task with a long review loop; transcript, repository paths, credentials, and external URLs were excluded.

fixtures.reviewerReply: {"decision":"approve","summary":"Historical review loop reached its accepted outcome.","comments":[]}
